bookShowcase.heading: Foundation
bookShowcase.title: Perfect Questions, Perfect Answers
bookShowcase.summary: A welcoming introduction to spiritual life through simple questions about the soul, Krishna, and the purpose of human existence.

bookShowcase.heading: Foundation
bookShowcase.title: Beyond Birth and Death
bookShowcase.summary: A clear explanation of the difference between body and soul, and how spiritual understanding frees one from fear and illusion.

bookShowcase.heading: Foundation
bookShowcase.title: Krishna, The Reservoir of Pleasure
bookShowcase.summary: An invitation to see Krishna as the all-attractive source of joy and to approach devotion as a personal, living relationship.

bookShowcase.heading: Foundation
bookShowcase.title: Science of Self-Realization
bookShowcase.summary: A broad collection of teachings on identity, consciousness, and spiritual practice applied to modern life and sincere inquiry.

bookShowcase.heading: Module 1
bookShowcase.title: Bhagavad-Gita As It Is
bookShowcase.summary: Establishes the foundations of duty, self-knowledge, disciplined practice, and the beginning stages of Krishna-centered spiritual life.

bookShowcase.heading: Module 2
bookShowcase.title: Sri Isopanisad
bookShowcase.summary: A concise guide to seeing everything in relation to the Supreme and living with gratitude, restraint, and divine awareness.

bookShowcase.heading: Module 3
bookShowcase.title: Bhagavad-Gita As It Is
bookShowcase.summary: Explores Krishna's energies, His personal nature, and the central place of devotion in spiritual realization.

bookShowcase.heading: Module 4
bookShowcase.title: Nectar of Instruction
bookShowcase.summary: Offers practical guidance for discipline, relationships, sacred habits, and progressive growth in devotional service.

bookShowcase.heading: Module 5
bookShowcase.title: Bhagavad-Gita As It Is
bookShowcase.summary: Completes the Gita with teachings on the modes, the nature of action, surrender, and the culmination of spiritual wisdom.

bookShowcase.heading: Module 6
bookShowcase.title: Nectar of Devotion
bookShowcase.summary: An in-depth study of the moods, practices, and theology of pure devotional service in the bhakti tradition.

handbook.heading:
Student Handbook
& Syllabus
handbook.note: The International Society for Krishna Consciousness Founder-Acarya: His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupada

courseInfo.label: Format
courseInfo.value: Guided Bhakti-sastri study with reading, discussion, and application

courseInfo.label: Resources
courseInfo.value: Meeting link, WhatsApp group, and course folder shared with enrolled students

handbook.method: The course follows a flipped-classroom approach: students study the assigned material before class, then meet for guided reflection, clarification, and lived application.
handbook.description: This syllabus presents the essential teachings of Bhakti Yoga through a systematic path that helps students connect spiritual study to practice, character, and daily life.
objectives: Help students connect teachings to real decisions and relationships.
Build confidence in presenting, discussing, and applying scriptural knowledge.
Deepen appreciation for Srila Prabhupada's mood and mission.
